parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ CampaignId: 481704, AccountLeadPairs: [{ AccountId: 110697, Lead: { ProfileUrl: $('Parse Message').item.json.CEO_LinkedIn, FirstName: $('Parse Message').item.json.CEO_First_name, LastName: $('Parse Message').item.json.CEO_Last_name }, CustomNote: $('Parse Message').item.json.LinkedIn_message }] }) }}

values.content: You are a cold outreach writer for Erica, a GTM consultant who builds custom AI SDR systems in n8n. Your job is to write LinkedIn DMs that feel like they came from someone who genuinely researched this specific founder — not just their company. The message should feel warm, human, and like Erica has been paying attention to this person for a while. Tone: casual, confident, a little impressed but never sycophantic. No exclamation points. No em dashes. No fluff. No generic openers like 'I noticed your company' or 'I came across your work'.

=Write four personalized LinkedIn messages from Erica to this founder. All four should feel like a real, evolving conversation — coherent, warm, and never repetitive. Each message should add something new rather than restate what came before.

CEO: {{ $json.CEO_First_name }} {{ $json.CEO_Last_name }}
Company: {{ $json.Organization_name }}
Founder detail (use to personalize — it's about the person): {{ $json.Founder_detail }}
Hook (non-obvious company insight): {{ $json.Hook }}
Company description (use to understand their ICP and buyers): {{ $json.Description }}

MESSAGE 1 — connection_request (STRICT: under 300 characters total, including spaces):
This is the note attached to a LinkedIn connection request. Lead with something specific about the FOUNDER (use Founder_detail) — sound like you've been following them, not just did a quick search. Weave in the Hook naturally as an extension of who they are. End with a soft one-line CTA like 'open to connect'. First name only. Never start with 'I'. No exclamation points. No em dashes.

MESSAGE 2 — first_message (sent after they accept the connection):
This message has one job: make them feel like Erica already understands their business and has built something specifically for them. Use Description to identify exactly who their buyers are — name them specifically (e.g. 'CFOs at mid-market SaaS companies' or 'procurement leads at logistics firms'). Then say Erica built a custom AI SDR system that finds and reaches exactly that type of buyer automatically — and that she can build the same for them. Make it feel like the ICP call-out is the hook, not the AI pitch. The AI SDR is the solution to the ICP problem they already know they have. 2–3 short sentences. Direct, warm, zero fluff. Never start with 'I'.

MESSAGE 3 — first_nudge (gentle follow-up if no reply to first_message):
Try a completely different angle — don't repeat anything from messages 1 or 2. Maybe ask a genuine question about their current outreach approach, or name a pain point founders in their space typically face. Under 3 lines. Low pressure, no urgency.

MESSAGE 4 — second_nudge (last attempt):
Very short — 1 to 2 lines max. Acknowledge they're probably slammed. One fresh thought: either a result Erica has seen, an easy question, or just an open door. Make it easy to say yes or no.

Rules for all messages: First name only. No exclamation points. No em dashes. No fluff. No generic openers like 'I noticed' or 'I came across'. Never start with 'I'.

Return strictly as JSON (no markdown, no extra text):
{
  "Organization_name": "{{ $json.Organization_name }}",
  "CEO_LinkedIn": "{{ $json.CEO_LinkedIn }}",
  "CEO_First_name": "{{ $json.CEO_First_name }}",
  "CEO_Last_name": "{{ $json.CEO_Last_name }}",
  "connection_request": "...",
  "first_message": "...",
  "first_nudge": "...",
  "second_nudge": "..."
}

json.Description: Rippling is a workforce management platform that unifies HR, IT, finance, and more, allowing businesses to execute more efficiently.
json.Hook: Rippling has a really unusual commitment to R&D among SaaS tech companies, spending an enormous amount on developing new products and building new software.
json.Founder_detail: Parker Conrad, the CEO and co-founder of Rippling, previously founded Zenefits and Wikinvest.
json.LinkedIn_message: Rippling's $1.2 billion in funding shows serious trust from top investors. I built an AI SDR system that found you, and I can create a tailored version for your ICP. Open to a quick chat?

Santiago, I noticed DualEntry is tackling some unique challenges in finance automation. I built an AI SDR that found you and I can create something similar tailored for your ideal client profile. Open to a quick chat?

json.Description: Factory is an AI startup building autonomous coding agents to automate software engineering tasks.
json.Hook: Factory's platform, powered by AI-driven agents called Droids, automates the full software engineering lifecycle, enabling teams to ship faster and improve code quality.
json.Founder_detail: Matan Grinberg, the CEO and founder of Factory, previously worked at Berkeley Lab and the Institute for Advanced Study.
json.LinkedIn_message: Scaling sales in a competitive market is tough. I built an AI SDR that found you and can create one tailored to your ICP. Open to a quick chat?

json.Description: OpenEvidence is an AI-driven medical information platform that provides synthesized, evidence-based content to healthcare professionals for improved clinical decision-making.
json.Hook: OpenEvidence's AI model achieved a 100% score on the USMLE in 2025, demonstrating its advanced capabilities in medical knowledge synthesis.
json.Founder_detail: Daniel Nadler, a Harvard Ph.D. and former founder of Kensho, launched OpenEvidence to address the challenge physicians face in keeping up with the growing volume of medical literature.
json.LinkedIn_message: Daniel, I see OpenEvidence is all about turning data into actionable insights. I built an AI SDR that found you, and I can create one tailored for your ideal customer profile. Open to a quick chat?

json.Description: Periodic Labs develops AI scientists and autonomous laboratories to accelerate scientific discovery in the physical sciences.
json.Hook: Periodic Labs raised a $300 million seed round in September 2025, one of the largest first institutional financings ever recorded for a private technology company.
json.Founder_detail: Ekin Dogus Cubuk led the materials and chemistry team at Google Brain and DeepMind, contributing to the GNoME materials-discovery project.
json.LinkedIn_message: Hi William, I noticed Periodic Labs is redefining lab insights. I built an AI SDR that found you and can create a similar system tailored to your ICP. Open to a quick chat?

json.Description: Phia is an AI-powered shopping agent that helps consumers compare prices, calculate resale value, summarize product details, and track price drops in real time.
json.Hook: Phia's AI agent scans over 350 million products across nearly 10,000 retail brand partners, including contemporary, resale, and luxury categories.
json.Founder_detail: Co-founder Phoebe Gates met co-founder Sophia Kianni at Stanford University, where they were randomly paired as roommates.
json.LinkedIn_message: Phoebe, scaling outreach can feel like running a marathon with no finish line. I built an AI SDR that found you, and I can create one tailored for your ICP. Open to a quick chat?

Hi Shruti, I noticed Zania is focused on improving customer engagement in a crowded market. I built an AI SDR that found you, and I can create one tailored for your target audience too. Open to a quick chat?
Hi Byung-Gon, I noticed how FriendliAI focuses on personalized user engagement. I've built an AI SDR that found you and I can create one tailored for your ideal customer profile. Up for a quick chat?

json.Description: Exa is a developer-focused search infrastructure company providing AI-native semantic search APIs optimized for large language models and AI agents.
json.Hook: Exa's semantic search technology is specifically designed to enhance AI agents' ability to retrieve relevant information, reducing hallucinations and improving the quality of retrieval-augmented generation systems.
json.Founder_detail: Co-founder Jeff Wang ran a GPU cluster in his dorm room while studying Computer Science and Philosophy at Harvard University.
json.LinkedIn_message: I noticed Exa is pushing boundaries in the tech space. I built an AI SDR that found you, and I can create a similar one tailored to your ideal customer profile. Open to a quick chat?

json.LinkedIn_message: Pablo, I noticed HappyRobot is all about leveraging tech to enhance creativity. I built an AI SDR that found you and I can create a similar system tailored to your ideal customer profile. Open to a quick chat?
Amit, did you know Luma AI can transform how businesses leverage visual content? I built an AI SDR that found you, and I can create a tailored version for your ideal customers. Open to a quick chat?
Dyna Robotics is pushing boundaries. I built an AI SDR that found you and can create one tailored for your ideal customer profile. Open to a quick chat?

Hi Joseph, I noticed Burnt’s approach to tackling challenges in your space. I built an AI SDR that flagged your company for its innovative strategies. I can create a custom system tailored for your ICP. Open to a quick chat?
Hammad, PlayAI seems focused on transforming AI engagement. I built an AI SDR that identified you, and I can create a similar system tailored for your ideal customers. Open to a quick chat?
Hey Jay, I noticed Eve's innovative take on user engagement. I built an AI SDR that helped me find you, and I can create a custom one tailored for your ideal customer profile. Open to a quick chat?
David, noticed Maisa's push for innovation in AI. I built an AI SDR that found you and I can create a similar system tailored for your ICP. Open to a quick chat?
Hi Dhruv, I noticed your work at Anything and how you're tackling unique challenges. I built an AI SDR that found you, and I can create one tailored for your ICP too. Open to a quick chat?

json.Hook: Trustible's platform embeds expert-level governance intelligence directly into AI review and approval processes, allowing teams to scale AI with confidence and trust.

json.LinkedIn_message: Hey David, ever think about how many connections slip through the cracks in outreach? I built an AI SDR that found you and I can create one tailored for your ICP at Recall.ai. Open to a quick chat?

Hey Shahar, finding quality leads in the security space can be tough. I built a custom AI SDR that identified your profile, and I can create a similar system tailored for your ICP at Terra Security. Are you open to a quick chat?

json.LinkedIn_message: Tudor, I see Harmonic is making waves in the industry. I built an AI SDR that found you and can create a similar system tailored for your ideal customer profile. Open to a quick chat?

Hey Joshua, I noticed Chai Discovery is tackling some interesting challenges in the research space. I built an AI SDR that found you, and I can create a custom version for your ideal customers. Open to a quick chat?

Janvi, running a company focused on color trends is no small feat. I built an AI SDR that found you and I can create a custom one tailored for your target audience too. Open to a quick chat?

json.Description: MagicDoor is an AI-native platform that automates property management tasks for landlords and property managers.

json.Founder_detail: Kasper Søgaard co-founded MagicDoor in 2023 and previously worked at Amazon.

json.Description: Augment connects enterprise data, processes, and customer interactions into a single AI execution layer, transforming information into action and delivering expert outputs directly in the flow of work.

json.Description: Scalekit provides an authentication stack for AI applications, offering modular components for secure agent identity and tool-calling.

json.Description: Cluely is an AI assistant company that provides real-time assistance during virtual meetings and interviews.

json.Founder_detail: David Henderson is one of the original founders of Trio, which launched in 2023 as OrdinalsBot.

json.Description: Skild AI develops a unified AI model, the Skild Brain, designed to control various robots across different tasks and environments.

json.Founder_detail: Deepak Pathak earned a PhD in AI at the University of California, Berkeley, and co-founded VisageMap, a facial recognition startup acquired by FaceFirst.

json.Founder_detail: Lukas Haffer previously served as Chief of Staff for the European Market at Avaloq, overseeing platforms managing $4 trillion in assets.

json.Description: Venteur is a health technology company that provides an AI-powered platform for Individual Coverage Health Reimbursement Arrangements (ICHRA), enabling employers to offer personalized health benefits to their employees.

json.Founder_detail: Dani Yogatama, the CEO of Reka AI, previously worked at Google DeepMind.

json.Description: Tie is a provider of AI-powered identity solutions for e-commerce brands, enabling them to convert anonymous website visitors into high-value customers.

json.Founder_detail: Michael Diesu, the CEO and founder of Tie, previously worked at Accenture before starting the company.

json.Description: Ultralytics is a leading AI company dedicated to creating transformative, open-source computer vision solutions, best known as the creators of the YOLO real-time object detection framework.

json.Founder_detail: Glenn Jocher founded Ultralytics in 2014, aiming to make AI open, accessible, and powerful enough to change the world.

json.Founder_detail: Dr. Mariana Matus, a computational biologist, initiated wastewater epidemiology research as a PhD student at MIT to apply technical skills to public health.

json.Founder_detail: Cy Khormaee led the security team at Google responsible for protecting billions of users from phishing, malware, and fraud before founding AegisAI.

json.Founder_detail: Jocelyn Shieh is the CEO of Chaima.AI, leading the company in providing tailored romantic getaways for couples.

json.Description: PlayerZero is a predictive software quality company that helps enterprises ship flawless software faster by fixing, learning from, and preventing problems before they impact customers.
json.Hook: PlayerZero's AI-powered platform deeply understands how code works across entire systems, predicts failures before they happen, and continuously learns from every issue to strengthen software resilience.
json.Founder_detail: Animesh Koratana founded PlayerZero in 2018 after working with early customers since late last year, officially launching the company in 2025.

json.Description: Delve is a multidisciplinary product innovation firm that helps companies bring bold ideas to market through advanced research, strategy, design, and engineering expertise.

json.Founder_detail: Before launching Delve, co-founder Selin Kocalar conducted research at MIT and Stanford, published 8 papers by age 20, and sent an experiment to the International Space Station as a high schooler.

json.Description: Accordance is an AI-native platform designed to assist tax, audit, and CPA teams by automating complex financial workflows and providing authoritative insights.
json.Hook: Accordance's AI platform has been adopted by educational institutions such as the USF School of Law, demonstrating its integration into academic settings.
json.Founder_detail: David Yue, CEO of Accordance, co-founded the company in 2024 after leading a $13 million funding round from prominent investors including Khosla Ventures and General Catalyst.

json.Description: Prompt Security is an Israeli cybersecurity company that developed an enterprise platform designed to secure employee use of AI and protect in-house AI applications by providing real-time visibility, policy enforcement, and automated risk mitigation for GPT-style systems and other generative AI deployments.
json.Hook: Prompt Security was acquired by SentinelOne in August 2025 at a valuation between $250M and $300M.
json.Founder_detail: Itamar Golan has spent the past 15 years at the intersection of AI and cybersecurity, having worked in organizations like the IDF, Check Point, and Orca Security.
